chainableled_setup.message0: Initialization Chained RGBLED %1 Clock pin %2 Data pin %3 Number of LEDs %4
chainableled_setup.tooltip: Create a chained RGB LED object, specifying the clock pin, data pin and number of LEDs

chainableled_init.tooltip: Initialize chained RGB LEDs, configure pins and set all LEDs to off state

chainableled_set_color_rgb.message0: Settings Chain RGBLED %1 LED number %2 Red %3 Green %4 Blue %5
chainableled_set_color_rgb.tooltip: Use RGB color mode (red, green, blue, 0-255) to set the color of the specified LED

chainableled_set_color_hsl.message0: Settings Chained RGBLED %1 LED Number %2 Hue %3 Saturation %4 Brightness %5
chainableled_set_color_hsl.tooltip: Set the color of the specified LED using HSL color mode (hue, saturation, brightness, 0-1)

chainableled_set_color.message0: Settings Chained RGBLED %1 LED Number %2 Color %3
chainableled_set_color.tooltip: Use the color picker to set the color of a specific LED
